data.title: President Donald J. Trump Reads 2 Chronicles 7 on Pure Flix during America Reads the Bible
data.description: A significant milestone was reached when the current president took part in a weeklong public reading of scripture in Washington. President Donald J. Trump participated by reading 2 Chronicles 7:11–22 during the America Reads the Bible event on Tuesday evening. This event is taking place over the course of a week.
TechCrunch reports that Meta plans to log employee keystrokes.
Hong Kong IPOs lure mainland China insurers seeking higher returns-SCMP

data.title: Steak n Shake Announces Creation of First-Ever Chief MAHA Officer to Usher in a New Era of Healthier Fast Food
data.description: Today, Steak n Shake revealed that Michael Boes, a prominent figure in developing the 2025–2030 Dietary Guidelines for Americans, will be joining the company as the inaugural Chief MAHA (Make America Healthy Again) Officer. This move signifies a pioneering step in the industry as Boes takes on this crucial role.
Air Current reports that Boeing has started certification testing of an EAI design fix for the 737 MAX aircraft.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Smashify/
data.description: Smashify has recently launched a beta platform aimed at transforming the streaming experience for artists and fans. The announcement was made on 21-Apr-2026 by Smashify through PR Newswire. The platform promises to revolutionize the way content is streamed. For further information and additional details, please refer to the updated news release.
China’s currency opens at 6.8247 per USD , down from the last close of 6.8316.

data.title: Nektar Therapeutics Announces Pricing of Upsized $325 Million Public Offering
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Nektar Therapeutics, listed on Nasdaq as NKTR, disclosed the pricing of its increased underwritten public offering valued at $325 million. The company, a clinical-stage biotech firm concentrating on pioneering medications in immunotherapy, made this announcement today.
The CATL CEO states the firm will continue enhancing production methods to ensure large-scale supply of high-quality products worldwide.
Cathay Pacific plans a three-year Hong Kong dollar bond, according to a term sheet.

data.title: Amcor to report fiscal 2026 third quarter results
data.description: Amcor plc (NYSE: AMCR; ASX: AMC) is set to release its fiscal 2026 third quarter results for the three-month period concluding on March 31, 2026. The announcement is scheduled to occur before the US market opens on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, around 6:00 AM Eastern Daylight Time.

data.title: AI-driven BEYON platform by Beca, powered by Microsoft Azure, is revolutionizing NZ's infrastructure, improving safety and efficiency.
data.description: The BEYON platform by Beca is transforming geotechnical data management in New Zealand by leveraging Microsoft Azure integration. This innovative approach is increasing safety and efficiency in the industry.
Trump considers extending waiver to ease US oil shipments - Axios
Gao Huan, CTO of CATL, says geopolitical tensions and higher oil prices are boosting prospects for energy storage and EV battery sectors.
India sees debut of Tesla’s 6-seat Model Y L Premium at ₹6.2 million, according to website.
China’s PBOC fixes yuan at 6.8635, compared with last close of 6.8316 per dollar.
Asian Currencies Mostly Strengthen Amid U.S.-Iran Cease-Fire Extension-WSJ

data.title: Trading Technologies and Mercantile Exchange of Vietnam Agree to Offer MXV Members Access to Global Derivatives Markets Through TT® Infrastructure
data.description: A deal between Trading Technologies International, Inc. (TT) and the Mercantile Exchange of Vietnam (MXV) was sealed today in Chicago and HANOI, Vietnam. TT, a provider of global capital markets technology platform services, confirmed an agreement with MXV for the adoption of TT's services. The announcement was made on April 21, 2026, through PRNewswire.

data.title: Kelun-Biotech Announces Three Clinical Study Results Selected for Oral Presentations at 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting
data.description: The 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting is scheduled to take place in Chicago from May 29 to June 2. During this event, Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. (6990.HK) will be sharing findings from three clinical trials.

data.title: FERMI PROVIDES BUSINESS UPDATE
data.description: Fermi Inc., also known as Fermi America, recently introduced Fermi 2.0 on April 20, 2026. Following this announcement, the Company has received substantial and favorable responses from various sources. The news was disclosed on April 21, 2026, through PRNewswire. Fermi is publicly traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol FRMI and on the London Stock Exchange as FRMI. The Company, operating as Fermi America™, is based in Dallas.
